use_cases: Landing page hero sections with eye-catching visual effects to capture visitor attention
SaaS product pages showcasing main value proposition with animated elements
Developer tool landing pages featuring prominent headlines with modern aesthetics
Marketing sites requiring gradient lamp effects for premium brand feel
Full-screen section displays with conic gradient lighting animations
ai_summary: A visually striking hero component featuring an animated lamp effect with cyan conic gradients on a dark slate background. Uses Framer Motion for scroll-triggered animations that reveal the lamp glow effect while displaying headline text with gradient styling. The component combines glass-morphism elements with modern dark UI aesthetics, making it ideal for SaaS landing pages and developer tool marketing sites seeking a premium, polished appearance.
